scripts.dev: pnpm run build:shared-types && pnpm -r run dev
scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared-types && pnpm run build:apps
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.clean: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run clean:cache && pnpm run clean:node_modules
scripts.clean:dist: rimraf packages/*/dist apps/*/dist && find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -not -path './node_modules/*' -delete 2>/dev/null || true && rimraf coverage apps/*/coverage packages/*/coverage
scripts.clean:node_modules: find . -type d -name 'node_modules' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true && rimraf pnpm-lock.yaml
scripts.clean:cache: rimraf .vite apps/*/.vite .eslintcache apps/*/.eslintcache .nyc_output apps/*/.nyc_output .tmp apps/*/.tmp packages/*/.tmp && rimraf **/.turbo **/dist-ssr
scripts.rebuild: pnpm run clean && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run clean:coverage-output && pnpm run test:coverage:frontend && pnpm run test:coverage:backend && pnpm run test:coverage:merge && pnpm run test:coverage:report
scripts.test:coverage:merge: mkdir -p .nyc_output && cp apps/frontend/coverage/coverage-final.json .nyc_output/frontend-coverage.json && cp apps/backend/coverage/coverage-final.json .nyc_output/backend-coverage.json && nyc merge .nyc_output .nyc_output/out.json
